prompt: A vertical smartphone screenshot of an AI chat app interface in light mode, showing the moment an image has just been generated. At the very top is a simple mobile app header with a hamburger menu icon on the left, the blue title “Thinking” with a right chevron beside it, and on the right a compose icon and a three-dot menu. Below that is the bottom portion of a rounded light-gray user message bubble containing Japanese text, visible across 4 lines: 「水彩や線画、油彩、カラー版画、 金箔アクセントなどを取り入れ てテクスチャも入れて立体的に、 芸術爆発させて」. Under the bubble, on a white background, place the gray system status line “Thought for a couple of seconds”, then a darker gray Japanese line “画像が作成されました”. Below that, centered and taking most of the lower half of the screen, display a large rounded-corner generated artwork preview. The artwork itself is an ultra-detailed cosmic visionary collage in a square format: a tiny glowing human figure stands at the vanishing point in the center bottom-middle, radiating light; two large semi-transparent human profiles or heads face inward from left and right midground; swirling galaxies, stars, nebulae, planets, floating geometric frames, transparent spheres, gold-leaf fragments, line art, splattered paint, and layered textures fill the scene. Use a dramatic palette of deep indigo, ultramarine, violet, magenta, white, and luminous gold, with explosive painterly energy combining watercolor, oil painting, printmaking, ink lines, and metallic foil accents. Include branching tree-like forms, abstract architectural steps on the right, a lotus-like flower on the left, multiple framed mini-scenes embedded in space, and dense luminous particle trails converging toward the central figure. The overall screenshot should feel like a real iPhone app capture, clean and minimal outside the artwork, with the generated image being the visual focal point.
